section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports tenderness to palpation in the right knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Tenderness to palpation is typically a physical exam finding documented by the clinician; phrased as patient report here, but conceptually aligns more with an observed exam finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient sustained a knee injury yesterday.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is historical information about the mechanism/onset of the problem, which belongs in the subjective history rather than the assessment.
